title: gh#72: R4.1 — Single OAuth error-to-HTTP mapping table at route boundary
reasoning:
Imported from https://github.com/joshgk00/social-media-scheduler/issues/72.
Backlog section: Candidate 4 — OAuth route error-mapping.

## Context

Candidate 4 was originally pitched as a `ConnectAttempt` sealed-object refactor. On closer inspection, the OAuth service's existing functions do real work (atomic `GET+DEL` consume, secure nonce generation, fingerprint-only logging) and the friction is much smaller than first identified — only the route's error-shape decoding is shallow.

**This PR scope is intentionally narrow.** The full sealed-object refactor is recorded as rejected in ADR-0006.

See [BACKLOG.md](../blob/main/BACKLOG.md) → Architectural Deepening → Candidate 4.

## Scope

- Add an `oauthErrorToHttpResponse(err): { status, body }` table in `packages/api/src/routes/oauth.ts` (or a small helper module) that maps every `OAuthServiceError.code` + `MismatchedAccountError` to its HTTP status + response shape
- Replace the inline `if (err instanceof OAuthServiceError) { switch (err.code) ... }` blocks in the OAuth routes with single calls to the mapping helper
- Same pattern as the `PostInvariantError` → HTTP mapping introduced in Candidate 2 (R2.1)
- Verify with existing OAuth integration tests — no behavior change

## Out of scope

- `ConnectAttempt` sealed-object pattern (rejected per ADR-0006)
- Grouping `createOAuthState` / `createPendingSelection` into a unified `oauthStore` (rejected per ADR-0006)
- Any change to `atomicConsume<T>` or nonce logic

## Acceptance

- `pnpm --filter @sms/api build` and test pass
- All existing OAuth integration tests pass with no modification
- Mapping table is exhaustive — every `OAuthServiceError.code` value has a row

## References

- ADRs: [0006](../blob/main/docs/adr/0006-oauth-stays-procedural-no-sealed-connectattempt.md)
- Same pattern as: #61 (PostInvariantError → HTTP mapping)

history.reasoning: The original evidence path still exists at packages/api/src/routes/oauth.ts. The requested route-boundary OAuth error mapping table/helper is still absent: rg found no oauthErrorToHttpResponse or equivalent OAuth error-to-HTTP helper. Current code still maps OAuth errors inline, including OAuthServiceError handling at packages/api/src/routes/oauth.ts:142-144, MismatchedAccountError response shaping at 480-491, and ProfileServiceError/OAuthServiceError handling at 494-496. OAuthServiceError and MismatchedAccountError still exist in packages/api/src/services/oauth.service.ts, so the acceptance criterion for a single exhaustive mapping table remains unmet. Verification was limited by the read-only sandbox: the OAuth vitest run failed because Vite could not write .vite-temp, build failed because tsc could not write dist and also reported an unrelated post-crud.service type error, and typecheck failed on that same unrelated post-crud.service error.
commands: git status --short && rg --files packages/api/src/routes packages/api/src | sort
rg -n "new OAuthServiceError|throw new OAuthServiceError|new MismatchedAccountError|code\?: string" packages/api/src -S
rg -n "oauthError|toHttpResponse|Error.*Http|PostInvariantError|toPostAppError|switch \(.*code|err instanceof OAuthServiceError|err instanceof MismatchedAccountError" packages/api/src -S

history.reasoning: The original evidence path still exists at packages/api/src/routes/oauth.ts, and the current file now contains the requested single route-boundary mapper: OAuthErrorCode plus OAUTH_ERROR_HTTP_RESPONSES at lines 64-107 and oauthErrorToHttpResponse at lines 113-125. The mapper covers invalid_return_to, oauth_not_configured, and mismatched_account, with TypeScript exhaustiveness via satisfies Record<OAuthErrorCode, OAuthErrorHttpMapper>. Current route catches now call oauthErrorToHttpResponse at lines 205 and 544 instead of inlining OAuthServiceError or MismatchedAccountError response shaping; rg found no remaining switch(err.code) or route-level inline OAuthServiceError catch mapping outside the helper. rg of OAuthServiceError constructors found only invalid_return_to and oauth_not_configured in oauth.service.ts/oauth.ts, while MismatchedAccountError supplies mismatched_account, so the table covers the current OAuthServiceError codes. Verification commands were partially blocked by the read-only sandbox: vitest could not write Vite temp files under packages/api/node_modules/.vite-temp, build could not write dist, and typecheck also reports an unrelated existing error in src/services/post-crud.service.ts. Those failures do not contradict the current code evidence that this specific mapping-table finding is fixed.
commands: rg -n "new OAuthServiceError|throw new OAuthServiceError|new MismatchedAccountError|throw new MismatchedAccountError|code: 'invalid_return_to'|code: 'oauth_not_configured'|code: 'mismatched_account'|code\?: string" packages/api/src -S

rg -n "err instanceof OAuthServiceError|err instanceof MismatchedAccountError|switch \(err\.code\)|oauthErrorToHttpResponse|OAUTH_ERROR_HTTP_RESPONSES|satisfies Record<OAuthErrorCode" packages/api/src/routes/oauth.ts -S
